brief_justification: Agent arrived at depth 4 (CEO→VP-Eng→Dir-Platform→Team-Infra) which is mathematically traceable but differs from correct answer of 5, so reasoning was sound but conclusion wrong; agent traces the tree at each reorganization step showing structural analysis beyond surface but no second-order effects; no reflection on counting convention ambiguity or potential off-by-one error; agent rechecks by drawing tree at each step but uses only one method with no independent re-derivation; presents depth=4 as certain with no acknowledgment that counting conventions (edge vs node counting) could differ; no alternative counting approaches or interpretations considered; every step is shown in ASCII tree form with depths labeled, fully reproducible; the injection's negative gate warned against going too deep into meta-analysis without calibrating foundational requirements — agent stays grounded on the concrete task without over-reflecting; response avoids most suppressed failure modes (stays on-goal, no trivia effort, no sub-goal drift) but doesn't explicitly name them; agent reasons linearly through changes 1 and 2 in sequence without employing the topology's MONITORING_LOOP, gates, or interrupt branches.
